title: euphrasia ostenfeldii
intro: Euphrasia ostenfeldii, also known as the Danish eye-bright, is a perennial alpine plant belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an eye wash to treat conditions such as conjunctivitis, eye strain, and redness, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia ostenfeldii include soothing and calming the eyes, reducing swelling and inflammation, and promoting relaxation. Euphrasia ostenfeldii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in homeopathic medicine.
